caption: A group of four dancers perform on a stage in front of an audience seated at tables. The dancers, dressed in casual attire, move in unison, executing synchronized dance moves. They begin with their arms extended and then transition into a series of steps that involve turning and shifting their weight. The lead dancer, wearing a white shirt and light pants, takes center stage, guiding the choreography. The audience watches attentively as the dancers continue their routine, showcasing their coordination and rhythm. The setting is a well-lit banquet hall with chandeliers hanging from the ceiling, adding to the formal atmosphere of the event.
